title: John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over Prestwick

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: JOHN Swinney is seeking a meeting with the UK Government over the US military

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over Prestwick This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: JOHN Swinney is seeking a meeting with the UK Government over the US military's use of Prestwick Airport. It comes as flight tracking data analysed by the BBC showed that some of the American military planes which have passed through the Ayrshire airport in recent weeks have been directly involved in supporting the US-Israeli strikes against Iran.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over US military using Prestwick
